creator: jwdevel@gmail.com
text:
Just another instance of this, as another data point:

I'm installing devel/py-buildbot.
It has these two strands of dependencies:
  * www/py-autobahn >> www/py-wsaccel >> lang/cython3
  * devel/py-pyyaml >> lang/cython

So, both of those cannot be satisfied at once.

As others mentioned, getting one of these deps built, then removing the cython it used, then building the other dep, is a (clunky) workaround.

I guess poudriere builds each one in a clean environment, so there are no conflicts? Gotta set that up some day...

____
My system: 14.2-RELEASE-p3, ports at 2025Q2
